member.name: M:CleanArchitecture.WebApi.Controllers.v1.ExpenseCategoriesController.Patch(System.Int32,CleanArchitecture.Core.Features.ExpenseCategories.Commands.UpdateExpenseCategory.UpdateExpenseCategoryCommand)
member.summary: Updates name and active flag of an expense category.

member.name: M:CleanArchitecture.WebApi.Controllers.v1.ExpensesController.Get(CleanArchitecture.Core.Features.Expenses.Queries.GetAllExpenses.GetAllExpensesParameter)
member.summary: Lists expenses with role-based visibility and filtering.
member.remarks: Employee sees own expenses, manager sees own plus managed-project team expenses, and admin sees all expenses.

member.name: M:CleanArchitecture.WebApi.Controllers.v1.ExpensesController.Get(System.Int32)
member.summary: Gets a single expense by id.

member.name: M:CleanArchitecture.WebApi.Controllers.v1.ExpensesController.Post(CleanArchitecture.Core.Features.Expenses.Commands.CreateExpense.CreateExpenseCommand)
member.summary: Creates a new expense in Draft status.

member.name: M:CleanArchitecture.WebApi.Controllers.v1.ExpensesController.Patch(System.Int32,CleanArchitecture.Core.Features.Expenses.Commands.UpdateExpense.UpdateExpenseCommand)
member.summary: Updates an expense owned by the authenticated user.
member.remarks: Only Draft or Rejected expenses can be updated.

member.name: M:CleanArchitecture.WebApi.Controllers.v1.ExpensesController.Delete(System.Int32)
member.summary: Soft-deletes an expense owned by the authenticated user.
member.remarks: Only Draft expenses can be deleted.

member.name: M:CleanArchitecture.WebApi.Controllers.v1.ExpensesController.Submit(System.Int32)
member.summary: Submits a Draft or Rejected expense for review.

member.name: M:CleanArchitecture.WebApi.Controllers.v1.ExpensesController.Reject(System.Int32,CleanArchitecture.Core.Features.Expenses.Commands.RejectExpense.RejectExpenseCommand)
member.summary: Rejects a Submitted expense in manager scope.

member.name: M:CleanArchitecture.WebApi.Controllers.v1.ReportsController.GetMyTimeSummary(System.Nullable{System.DateTime},System.Nullable{System.DateTime},System.String)
member.summary: Returns time summary for the authenticated user.

member.name: M:CleanArchitecture.WebApi.Controllers.v1.ReportsController.GetManagerTeamTimeSummary(System.Nullable{System.Int32},System.String,System.Nullable{System.DateTime},System.Nullable{System.DateTime},System.String)
member.summary: Returns team time summary for manager/admin scope.

member.name: M:CleanArchitecture.WebApi.Controllers.v1.ReportsController.GetMyExpenseSummary(System.Nullable{System.DateTime},System.Nullable{System.DateTime},System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Returns expense summary for the authenticated user.

member.name: M:CleanArchitecture.WebApi.Controllers.v1.ReportsController.GetManagerTeamExpenseSummary(System.Nullable{System.Int32},System.String,System.Nullable{System.Int32},System.Nullable{System.DateTime},System.Nullable{System.DateTime},System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Returns team expense summary for manager/admin scope.

member.name: M:CleanArchitecture.WebApi.Controllers.v1.ReportsController.GetProjectSummary(System.Int32)
member.remarks: Includes total time, total expenses, and billable entry rate for the given project.

member.name: M:CleanArchitecture.WebApi.Controllers.v1.ReportsController.ExportMyTimeSummary(System.String,System.Nullable{System.DateTime},System.Nullable{System.DateTime},System.String)
member.summary: Exports authenticated user's time summary as CSV.

member.name: M:CleanArchitecture.WebApi.Controllers.v1.ReportsController.ExportManagerTeamTimeSummary(System.String,System.Nullable{System.Int32},System.String,System.Nullable{System.DateTime},System.Nullable{System.DateTime},System.String)
member.summary: Exports manager/admin team time summary as CSV.

member.name: M:CleanArchitecture.WebApi.Controllers.v1.ReportsController.ExportMyExpenseSummary(System.String,System.Nullable{System.DateTime},System.Nullable{System.DateTime},System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Exports authenticated user's expense summary as CSV.

member.name: M:CleanArchitecture.WebApi.Controllers.v1.ReportsController.ExportManagerTeamExpenseSummary(System.String,System.Nullable{System.Int32},System.String,System.Nullable{System.Int32},System.Nullable{System.DateTime},System.Nullable{System.DateTime},System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Exports manager/admin team expense summary as CSV.
